item.title: Real-Time Simulation Integration Drives Quality and Control in Robotics Engineering – Metrology and Quality News
item.description: PTC has announced a new robotics design-to-simulation workflow that connects PTC’s cloud-native Onshape computer-aided design (CAD) and product data management (PDM) platform with NVIDIA Isaac Sim open simulation framework.

item.title: Nikon Boosts Throughput and Automation with Next-Generation NEXIV Software – Metrology and Quality News
item.description: Nikon Corporation has announced major advancements across its NEXIV software lineup with the release of the newest versions of AutoMeasure and Advanced Measure, designed to significantly simplify program creation, automate operator tasks, and accelerate high‑volume measurement workflows.

item.title: Intelligent Automation-Led Manufacturing Emerges as a Strategic Imperative for Automakers – Metrology and Quality News
item.description: “The intelligent factory is no longer a future ambition – it has become essential for manufacturers looking to stay competitive in a challenging and fast-moving environment,” said Joerg Reger, Managing Director of ABB Robotics Automotive Business Line.

item.title: Renault to Deploy 350 Humanoid Robots in Industrial Automation Push – Metrology and Quality News - Online Magazine
item.description: Rollout represents clear indication that humanoid robotics is moving beyond the prototype stage and into practical industrial use.

item.title: Inspection Equipment Trends Rebound as Machinery Orders Surge in 2025
item.description: After three years of reduced demand, orders of metalworking machinery had a strong rebound in 2025.

item.title: LUCID RGB-D Time-of-Flight Cameras
item.description: The new Chroma models combine 3D depth sensing with a 3.2 MP Triton® RGB camera in a rugged, space-saving housing.

item.title: Advancing Robotics with 3D Vision, AI, and Edge Computing for Smarter Automation
item.description: As environments grow more unpredictable, machines need more than accuracy; they need intelligence, the ability to adapt and respond to real-time challenges.
